title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Urban Development and Housing Board 2021-01, Dated August 06, 2021, Entitled: ?resolution Recommending the Inclusion of the National Housing Authority and the Provincial Urban Development and Housing Office As Members of the Local Inter-agency Committee (LIAC) for Presidential Proclamation 550 in Barangays Lalakay, Bambang and Timugan.?
